lines.text: Program, management and general, and fundraising expense matrix disclosed per ASC 958 958-720-45-2, 958-205-45-6 using direct identification with time studies for shared costs.
Form 990 Part IX functional expenses tie to Part X balance sheet totals per ASC 958 958-720-45-2, 958-205-45-6.
Natural expense classification (salaries, occupancy, depreciation, professional fees) disclosed per ASC 958 958-720-45-15.
Allocation methodology (time study) and rationale disclosed per ASC 958 958-720-50-1: Shared costs allocated using periodic FTE time studies and direct identification where observable.
